{
  "society_power": 6.0,
  "state_power": 4.5,
  "society_change": 1.5,
  "state_change": 1.0,
  "key_event": "Partition of Bengal and Swadeshi Movement",
  "reasoning": "The partition of Bengal and subsequent Swadeshi movement significantly strengthened civil society, while state power increased modestly due to the Morley-Minto Reforms and initial World War I mobilization."
}
